summary: Comprehensive testing of generic tag → campaign auto-enrollment system. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests confirmed tag picker with selectable chips and campaign toggle functionality on the create-card page.

frontend_tests.tag_picker_visible: PASSED - 'APPLY TAG (OPTIONAL)' section with helper text
frontend_tests.tag_chips_display: PASSED - Shows: Follow Up, Hot Lead, New Customer, Out of State, Service Due, Sold, VIP, e2e-test-tag
frontend_tests.tag_selection_works: PASSED - Clicking VIP/Sold shows checkmark and highlighted border
frontend_tests.campaign_toggle_appears: PASSED - 'Start follow-up campaign' toggle appears when tag selected (default ON)
frontend_tests.campaign_toggle_hidden_when_no_tags: PASSED - Toggle hidden when all tags deselected

backend: GET /api/tags/{user_id} - returns available tags with _id, name, color fields
POST /api/tags/{user_id}/assign - assigning 'Sold' tag triggers campaign auto-enrollment
POST /api/tags/{user_id}/assign with skip_campaign=true - applies tag but does NOT create enrollment
POST /api/tags/{user_id}/assign with 'VIP' tag - triggers VIP campaign enrollment
POST /api/tags/{user_id}/assign with 'Hot Lead' tag - gracefully skips (no matching template)
POST /api/congrats/create - accepts 'tags' (JSON array) and 'skip_campaign' Form params
GET /api/campaigns/templates/prebuilt - returns templates with trigger_tags: sold, be_back, service_due, referral, vip
Campaign config auto_enroll_on_tag defaults to true
frontend: Create card page (/settings/create-card?type=congrats) shows tag picker
Tag chips are colored pills with tag name
Clicking a tag chip selects it (checkmark + highlighted border)
'Start follow-up campaign' toggle appears when 1+ tags selected (default ON with green switch)
Toggle can be clicked to disable campaign enrollment

seed_data_creation: Test cards created with 'TEST_TagCard Customer' and 'TEST_SkipCampaign Customer' during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Generic tag-campaign auto-enrollment system fully working. PREBUILT_TEMPLATES in campaigns.py contains 5 templates with trigger_tags: sold, be_back, service_due, referral, vip. Tags without matching templates (Hot Lead, New Customer, Follow Up, Out of State) gracefully skip enrollment. Frontend tag picker in create-card.tsx shows all available tags as selectable chips with campaign toggle.
